objective.title: AI startup live opportunity proof
objective.query: AI startup cloud credit program with explicit benefits and application details

topOpportunity.title: AWS Activate Credits
topOpportunity.fitReason: clear value signal (Up to $100,000 in AWS Activate Credits); application path is explicit
evidenceSnippets: Eligible startups can apply to receive up to $100,000 in credits to build, grow, and scale.
Activate Portfolio offers up to $100,000 USD AWS Activate Credits for startups associated with an Activate Provider
AWS Activate Credits are redeemable on third-party models on Amazon Bedrock
To be eligible for AWS Activate Credits, startups must be pre-series B, have a company website or company profile, be founded in the last 10 years and have an AWS Account on Paid Tier Plan.
